seoTitle: Trunding vs Tuan Forest — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Trunding and Tuan Forest. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Trunding vs Tuan Forest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Trunding and Tuan Forest.
heading: Trunding vs Tuan Forest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Trunding, Queensland and Tuan Forest, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Trunding has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Tuan Forest (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Trunding or Tuan Forest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Trunding has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Tuan Forest scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Trunding scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Tuan Forest scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Trunding or Tuan Forest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Trunding has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
